asset_groups.name: Wave graphic colorway family
asset_groups.semantics: Two approved wave colorways (Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue), each available in long and short variants; use approved color values only.

assets.description: Branded orange/yellow gradient PNG used as the full-width background for the Gradient Callout CTA section; sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning 600px, with a solid Sunshine #faa31b fallback.

quotes: **Background image:** asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor.
the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px)

assets.description: LISRAYA logo mark/icon whose 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances; placed at the lightest end of the masthead gradient for contrast.

quotes: The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).
**Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

assets.description: Fluid wave graphic in the Sunshine/Gold colorway (Gold top layer at 70% transparency over Sunshine base), available in long and short variants.

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)

assets.description: Fluid wave graphic in the Sky Blue/Deep Blue colorway (Sky Blue top layer at 70% transparency over Deep Blue base), available in long and short variants.

quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)

assets.description: Brand accent shape: a rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii (asymmetric rounded-corner crop) used to house callout text and photography.

quotes: A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography.
Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.

assets.description: Warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery — real moments of everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ); housed in the accent shape and paired with patient quotes.

quotes: Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ).
paired with warm lifestyle imagery

assets.description: Minimal line-illustration icons (consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work), default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds; min render 32×32px in email.

quotes: Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall.
minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds

assets.description: White rounded-square icon badge (80px, inner icon 48px) mirroring the accent shape radii (20px 4px 20px 4px), carrying a subtle Dark Navy drop shadow; straddles the icon-callout box's left edge. May be pre-composited as a transparent PNG for pixel-perfect fidelity.

quotes: **Icon badge** ? a **White `#ffffff` rounded square** holding the line icon (Brand Blue stroke)
**pre-composite the white badge (with its shadow, accent radii, and icon) as a transparent PNG**

assets.description: CTA shape/treatment SVG with a horizontal linear gradient from #FFDF55 to #FAA21B used for CTAs (internal banner).

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

subtypes.best_for: Self-contained, stackable 600px email section blocks assembled with zero-gap stacking

quotes: Each section is a self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color; **no margins outside the section** — assembly is direct stacking.
sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly

subtypes.name: Email / Modular Section Block

subtypes.best_for: Core-team-inserted header holding Priovant logo and top matter

quotes: Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team
Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**

subtypes.name: Email / Locked Header Component

subtypes.best_for: Core-team-inserted footer/ISI holding copyright, ® legal line, job code, Indication, and ISI

quotes: Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI all live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**
Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team

subtypes.name: Email / Locked Footer + ISI Component

templates.body: Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯

quotes: Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help Visit LISRAYA.com  ❯

templates.description: Full-width banner with a centered headline and a single button stacked over the branded orange/yellow gradient background; headline Brand Blue ~28px 800 in top third, button Deep Blue fill with white 800 label and Gold arrow, 248×64px, signature asymmetric radius.

quotes: A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
### [IMPORTANT] Gradient Callout CTA Section Rule

templates.name: Gradient Callout CTA Section

templates.body: These improvements occurred as early as four weeks after starting treatment, and they continued getting better through the end of the 52-week study.

quotes: These improvements occurred as early as four weeks after starting treatment, and they continued getting better through the end of the 52-week study.

templates.description: Light-blue accent-shape box with short blue 800 headline text and a white icon badge that straddles the box's left edge (50/50 over the edge); box radius 40px 8px 40px 8px, badge radius 20px 4px 20px 4px, badge with Dark Navy drop shadow.

quotes: A **light-blue accent-shape box** containing a short blue headline, with a **white icon badge that straddles the box's left edge**
### [IMPORTANT] Icon Callout Box Rule

templates.name: Icon Callout Box Section
